mentions.note: Animal health company preferred over Zoetis; CEO Jeff Simmons has strong track record.

Animal health company spun from Eli Lilly (2018); turnaround story: up 137% past 12 months. Q4: 12% revenue growth, 2¢ EPS beat. Six blockbuster drugs: Credelio Quattro (parasiticides, 30% growth, winning 'puppy index'), Zenrelli (derm, 40% Brazil market share), Buffrena (monoclonal antibody derm). Farm animal up 17% (Experior beef cattle +80%); benefiting from protein revolution (GLP-1, aging population, dietary guidelines). Pet humanization globalizing (70% puppies outside US). 3-year guidance: mid-single-digit revenue growth, high-single-digit EBITDA, low-double-digit EPS growth.
